ctaSection.title: Tell us about your product. We'll engineer the machine.
ctaSection.subtitle: Custom packaging machines, expert consultation, and lifetime support — all in one place.

hero.title: Engineering packaging since 2007
hero.subtitle: A family-built industrial company specializing in customized packaging machines for manufacturers across food, cosmetics, chemicals, and more.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Alin Pack was founded in 2007 with one clear belief: every product deserves a packaging machine designed specifically for it. From our base in Deir Hanna, we've spent nearly two decades helping manufacturers across Israel — and beyond — package their products faster, cleaner, and more efficiently.
story.p2: Over the years we've grown from a small workshop into a trusted partner for hundreds of manufacturers. What hasn't changed is our approach: we start every project by listening, then engineer the solution around the customer.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.text: To deliver packaging machines that fit our customers' products exactly — supported by honest consultation, premium engineering, and long-term service.

quality.title: Engineering quality
quality.description: Premium components, robust build, real-world reliability.

honesty.title: Honest consultation
honesty.description: We recommend what fits your product — not what's easiest to sell.

partnership.title: Long-term partnership
partnership.description: Service, spare parts, and support for the entire machine lifecycle.

innovation.title: Practical innovation
innovation.description: Modern packaging technology applied where it actually matters.

process.title: How a custom solution comes together

one.title: Consultation
one.description: We learn about your product, packaging needs, and production targets.

two.title: Recommendation
two.description: We propose the right machine — or design a custom configuration.

three.title: Engineering
three.description: Our team configures, builds, and tests the line for your product.

four.title: Installation
four.description: We install on-site and train your operators.

five.title: Support
five.description: Ongoing service, spare parts, and technical support.
